text: Let me check what urgency and status values actually exist in the data:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT DISTINCT urgency, status, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY urgency, status) as cnt FROM pagerduty_incidents ORDER BY urgency, status"}

text: The urgency values are lowercase. Let me re-run with the correct casing:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, service, assignee, created_at FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE urgency = 'high' AND status = 'triggered'"}
